final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for a "大话西游" tribute (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic — exact film stock and stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include central embrace on city wall, two figures standing in distance
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in embrace (central), 牛魔王 (distant), 唐僧 (distant)
Scene/backdrop: must include ancient Chinese city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a nostalgic romantic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a 90s Hong Kong cinema color direction — exact saturation and grading is yours
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
